content: STOP RENTING INTELLIGENCE. You’re paying $20/month for a web UI wrapper. The Road4AI revolt starts now. The SaaS Tax. Claude Pro? Rent. OpenAI? Rent. They want you dependent on their dashboards. We build on the CLI. We own the environment. Gemini CLI. Fast. Local. Deep integration. No monthly subscription. ZERO-COST FIRST. If it costs a subscription, it’s not engineering—it’s shopping. HIGH SIGNAL. NO FLUFF. LEARN IN PUBLIC. Every win is a tutorial. Every bug is a post. 7-Layer Agent Architecture. From User to Operator. The window is closing. Total technical liberation for $0.00.
